name: Saffron Rice (Kesar Chawal)
recipeInstructions:
1. In a separate bowl, soak the saffron in 2 tablespoons of hot water.
2. Heat the butter and fry the onions over medium heat until golden brown. Add the cinnamon stick, cumin seeds, cardamom pods, and cloves. Cook for about 1 minute.
3. Add the bay leaves and sliced onion to the pot. Stir everything together.
4. Add the rice and stir until each grain is well coated with butter. Pour in the water and bring to a boil.
5. Reduce heat to low and add the saffron and its soaking liquid. Cover and cook over medium-low heat until the rice is tender and fluffy.
6. Remove from heat and let sit, covered, for 5-10 minutes before serving.
